description: In the episode’s quiet final moments, Coulson and May talk privately about his fast-approaching retirement and dreams for the future. Coulson bequeaths Daisy a touching letter and shares private words of love with her, then jokes with May about bucket-list adventures as they look to whatever time remains. The scene closes with a sense of peace and hope amid the losses endured.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: How long did Simmons say you have?
Days. Weeks, if I'm lucky. But it'll be time well spent. I left you something in your bunk. It's a letter. Nothing fancy. Basically, just says how proud I am of you. I am so proud.
Hmm. So anything else on your bucket list?
Yeah, parasailing. Always wanted to try that.
All right, Director, where to first?
